phone_presence_notes: Daniel was professional and kept the rebooking smooth, but used Noah's name only at the opener and the tone stayed largely transactional throughout.
top_strength: Deep methodical inventory — room-by-room with follow-up on material quality and assembly needs, well-structured estimate.
coaching_note: Rebooking call still needed damage coverage, Meet Your Mover, and On-Time Guarantee — existing customers need the full value narrative.
